children.heading: Nonsubstitution
children.label: a Nonsubstitution
children.text: Funds provided under may not be used to satisfy a financial commitment for services that would have been paid for from another public or private source, including any medical program administered by the Secretary of Defense, but for the enactment of this subchapter, except that whenever considered necessary to prevent a delay in the receipt of appropriate early intervention services by an infant, toddler, or family in a timely fashion, funds provided under may be used to pay the provider of services pending reimbursement from the agency that has ultimate responsibility for the payment.section 1443 of this titlesection 1443 of this title

children.heading: Obligations related to and methods of ensuring services
children.label: b Obligations related to and methods of ensuring services
i
children.text: the provision of, and financial responsibility for, services provided under this subchapter; and

children.label: ii
children.text: such services are consistent with the requirements of and the State’s application pursuant to , including the provision of such services during the pendency of any such dispute.section 1435 of this titlesection 1437 of this title

children.heading: Consistency between agreements or mechanisms under subchapter II
children.label: B Consistency between agreements or mechanisms under subchapter II
children.text: The Chief Executive Officer of a State or designee of the officer shall ensure that the terms and conditions of such agreement or mechanism are consistent with the terms and conditions of the State’s agreement or mechanism under , where appropriate.section 1412(a)(12) of this title

children.heading: Reimbursement for services by public agency
children.label: 2 Reimbursement for services by public agency

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If a public agency other than an educational agency fails to provide or pay for the services pursuant to an agreement required under paragraph (1), the local educational agency or State agency (as determined by the Chief Executive Officer or designee) shall provide or pay for the provision of such services to the child.

children.heading: Reimbursement
children.label: B Reimbursement
children.text: Such local educational agency or State agency is authorized to claim reimbursement for the services from the public agency that failed to provide or pay for such services and such public agency shall reimburse the local educational agency or State agency pursuant to the terms of the interagency agreement or other mechanism required under paragraph (1).

children.label: B
children.text: signed agreements between respective agency officials that clearly identify the responsibilities of each agency relating to the provision of services; or

children.label: C
children.text: other appropriate written methods as determined by the Chief Executive Officer of the State or designee of the officer and approved by the Secretary through the review and approval of the State’s application pursuant to .section 1437 of this title

children.heading: Reduction of other benefits
children.label: c Reduction of other benefits
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to permit the State to reduce medical or other assistance available or to alter eligibility under title V of the Social Security Act [ et seq.] (relating to maternal and child health) or title XIX of the Social Security Act [ et seq.] (relating to medicaid for infants or toddlers with disabilities) within the State.42 U.S.C. 70142 U.S.C. 1396
